definition:
1. to be unlucky  or unfortunate, fail, miscarry , (Herdotus Historicus), etc. 
2. with genitive, to fail of  a thing, fail in getting  or gaining  it, τῆς ἀληθείας (Xenophon Historicus); so, with participle, (Thucydides) 
3. ἀτ. πρός τινα to fail with  another, i. e. to fail in one's request, (Xenophon Historicus):—;Pass., τὰ ἀτυχηθέντα mischances, failures , (Demosthenes Orator) (ML)
